response.justification: The candidate is a talented full-stack engineer with excellent software craftsmanship, but lacks the critical requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency (required), embedded C/Unix firmware development experience (only 6 months at National Instruments), and networking/security domain expertise. Their career trajectory focuses on web, cloud, and high-level languages rather than embedded systems, kernel programming, or networking protocols essential for LAN-switch security development.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software engineering across diverse domains demonstrating strong technical foundation
Deep commitment to code quality, testing practices, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Proven ability to learn and work across multiple programming languages and technology stacks
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency—a hard requirement for this role; only English (fluent), Romanian (fluent), and German (basic) listed
Minimal embedded C development for Unix systems—only 6 months at National Instruments; primary experience is web/cloud (Node.js, TypeScript, React)
No demonstrated expertise in networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP, Layer 2/3), security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), or Linux kernel analysis/modification
